content.content: Professional wrestler who previously competed as a powerlifter and a rower. He became the first Bulgarian to wrestler for World Wrestling Entertainment in 2010. He has also been known professionally as Rusev, Miroslav, and Alexander Rusev. He made his wrestling debut as part of the independent circuit starting in 2008 and won his debut versus Aerial Star. He has been called The Bashing Bulgarian, The Bulgarian Brute, and The Super-Athlete. He won the AEW TNT Championship in 2021. He emigrated from Bulgaria to the US and lived in Virginia, California, and later Florida. He marriedCJ Perryin 2016, but they divorced in 2024. He defeated Consequences Creed, also known asXavier Woods, in 2014.
